RESOLUTION.DESC:
The Security Council,
Recognizing the Injunction of [region]Cordone[/region], passed most recently by this body in an attempt to forestall the illicit Frontier’s conversion to Stronghold in an attempt to evade justice,
Noting the prescient effort of the Injunction as the first step in an arduous journey to ensure due justice for the region's errant leadership,
Affirming the validity of SC#575, whose passage, as a foregone conclusion, compelled the leaders of the failed region to mass expel their own member states and primed them to attempt a panicked refound of the region as a Stronghold,
Celebrating the efforts of the collected forces to thwart this attempt by staging a coordinated refound watch of the region over the subsequent updates, ultimately resulting in a successful and permanent wresting of the region from its disgraced leaders,
Acknowledging that this permanent control of the region by the collected forces now renders an injunction of the region unnecessary and obsolete, as it sits as a failstate destined for the history books as a sour footnote,
Concluding that a repeal of the Injunction will be a fitting last chapter in the ignominious saga of this sickening, spite-driven and spectacularly mismanaged regional order,
Hereby Repeals: “Injunct Cordone”.
RESOLUTION.NAME: Repeal "Injunct Cordone"
